C:\mingw64\mingw32\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\TerrainGen.dir/objects.a
C:\mingw64\mingw32\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\TerrainGen.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\TerrainGen.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\mingw64\mingw32\bin\g++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\TerrainGen.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o TerrainGen.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libTerrainGen.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\TerrainGen.dir\linkLibs.rsp
